items.title: Website-analysis failure no longer skips the GBP analysis
items.expected: A rejecting website branch is swallowed + logged + degraded (onFailure runs); a resolving/absent branch is a no-op. Downstream GBP analysis is unaffected.
items.evidence: 4/4 unit tests pass. Decoupling shipped in processor; committed 1dfbfe6d. realtime_status monotonicity already guaranteed by updateFieldsWithRealtimeFloor (GREATEST).
items.notes: Live forced-failure integration test deferred — would need a processor mock harness (scrape/apify/llm/s3). Happy path unchanged (await of same promise).

items.title: Website-scan tags are activity verbs, not fake verdicts
items.precondition: leadgen tool running; reach the website-scan stage with a screenshot loaded
steps: 2. Watch the floating badges during the website scan
items.expected: Badges read 'Checking speed', 'Locating CTAs', 'Verifying SSL' — none asserts 'OK/Found/Secure/Optimized'.
items.evidence: Relabeled + committed (leadgen-tool 9e50030); tsc clean. Visual confirm on next audit.
items.notes: Messages were already neutral; only the result-asserting tags changed.

items.title: Prod tracking-key parity (the /leadgen/event 400)
steps: 2. Confirm the deployed audit.getalloro.com bundle carries the same value
3. Confirm a bad key path returns 401, not 400
items.expected: Either a proven mismatch (then aligned) or proven parity (then no change).
items.evidence: Proven PARITY — backend key == deployed-bundle key (both dev-leadgen-change-me-2026). No prod change made. 400 is a payload rejection (invalid_session_id / invalid_event_name), not auth (auth = 401).
items.notes: Hygiene: prod uses the placeholder key; rotation needs a coordinated FE rebuild + BE env, out of scope here. The actual 400 root-cause is a separate investigation.

items.title: Increase / honestly represent the competitor cohort
steps: 1. Decide: widen radius (serialize self+competitor fetch), broaden category (mix specialties), or label-only
2. Implement chosen strategy in scrapeCompetitorGBPs / CompetitorStringBuilder
items.expected: A larger cohort or an explicit limited-cohort signal, without degrading the ranking grade.
items.evidence: Decision: honesty-only. Shipped (leadgen 854ef72) — Local Ranking card shows 'Ranked against N nearby competitors'; when N<4 it adds 'Limited local cohort — directional, not definitive'. tsc clean.
items.notes: No cohort increase / no pipeline change / no grade change, per decision. Live screenshot pending — the Playwright browser hung on the ?audit_id= remount route (server healthy); worth a manual look.
